name: SCC_GetDCStatusCode
title: SCC_GetDCStatusCode
syntax: void SCC_GetDCStatusCode ( byte SessionID[], char StatusCode[] ) // form 1
description: Outputs the DC status in string form.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF
